command.cooldown: Hold on, command *{command}* can be used again in *{remaining}* seconds.
command.limit_reached: You've reached your daily limit. Try again tomorrow!
command.error: An error occurred while executing *{command}*. Please try again later.
validation.require_owner: This command can only be used by the owner.
validation.require_group: Command *{command}* can only be used in groups.
validation.require_private: Command *{command}* can only be used in private chat.
validation.require_premium: Command *{command}* is for premium users only.
validation.require_group_admin: You need to be a group admin to use this command.
validation.require_bot_admin: The bot needs to be a group admin to run this command.
general.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
general.not_registered: You're not registered yet. Type *{prefix}register* to sign up.
general.maintenance: The bot is under maintenance. Please try again later.
general.private_only: This command can only be used in private chat.
